untranslatable_reason: Signal requires direct measurement of: (1) inventory levels and their 2-year percentile range, (2) production pipeline lead time in days, (3) demand volatility coefficient of variation, and (4) storage cost as percentage of commodity price. None of these fundamental/structural metrics are available in the allowed indicator set, which contains only price-action and technical indicators. The signal is microstructure-based and cannot be fully translated without commodity-specific data feeds.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using price_pos_20 (position in 20-period Donchian range) as a proxy for inventory percentile, and hvol_20 (20-period historical volatility) as a proxy for demand volatility, but these are fundamentally different metrics. The core logic of inventory imbalance exploitation cannot be captured with technical indicators alone. A proper implementation requires commodity inventory databases, production schedules, and storage cost feeds.
